The Hiking Backpack · Reset Guide

Pack it back.
Leave it ready.

Congratulations on completing the backpack! If you don’t mind putting it back together, below are the instructions to do so.

Re-assembly progress 0 / 12 done
Start here — work top to bottom
Backpack overview
Here are all the items that you used throughout the game.
Lock 10 – 4 1 3 0 – Treasure Bag
Please include the remaining plushies and the congratulations card in the treasure bag. You need to pinch the top of the bag to thread the lock.
Lock code: 4 1 3 0 – code to be displayed: 0 0 0 0
Lock 9 – 6 3 2 – Pouch inside pocket
The inside pocket of the pouch contains the red 3 made of Legos. Lock to be looped inside the zip tie.
Lock code: 6 3 2 – code to be displayed: 0 0 0
Lock 8 – D I C K – Pouch back pocket
The pouch back pocket contains the birthday agenda and the map pieces. Lock to be looped inside the zip tie.
Lock code: D I C K – code to be displayed: L O S T
Lock 7 – 5 1 8 – Pouch main pocket
The pouch main pocket contains the notepad with the riddle, the brown 1 made of Lego and the “jobs” pieces. Place the lock inside both zipper pull tab loops.
Lock code: 5 1 8 – code to be displayed: 0 0 0
Lock 6 – 1 0 2 – Pouch front pocket
The pouch front pocket contains the blue squared Lego puzzle and the “Hair” pieces. Please reset the Lego puzzle. Lock to be looped inside the zip tie.
Lock code: 1 0 2 – code to be displayed: 0 0 0
Lock 5 – 4 1 4 – Backpack inside pocket
The inside pocket of the backpack contains the otter puzzles pieces, the PWHL hockey cards and the “faces” pieces. Please put the hockey cards and the puzzles pieces inside the cardboard box. Lock to be looped inside the zip tie.
Lock code: 4 1 4 – code to be displayed: 0 0 0
Lock 4 – 3 2 6 – Backpack top pocket
The top pocket of the backpack contains the Lego satellite pieces, the “Pets” pieces and the orange 4 made of Legos. Lock to be looped inside the zip tie.
Lock code: 3 2 6 – code to be displayed: 0 0 0
Lock 3 – M O O N – Backpack main compartment
The main compartment of the backpack contains most of the items:
– In the back pocket: the Lego satellite instructions and the card with the equation
– In the middle pocket: the periodic table and the yellow card
– Loose in the main compartment: the treasure bag, the locked pouch, the calculator, the Lego cube pieces and the “Jobs” pieces.
Place the lock inside both zipper pull tab loops.
Lock code: M O O N – code to be displayed: L O C K
Lock 2 – 7 3 4 – Backpack front pocket
The backpack front pocket contains the grandparents’ card with the news clipping and the brown flat Lego puzzle. Please reset the Lego puzzle (instructions below) with the red tile in it.
Lock to be looped inside the zip tie.
Lock code: 7 3 4 – code to de displayed: 0 0 0
Lock 1 – 7 4 9 – Backpack front compartment
The front compartment of the backpack contains the word search/sudoku page, the note about the backpack, the blue 0 made from Legos, the “Hobbies” pieces and a marker.
Please place the marker, hobbies pieces and blue 0 in the net.
Please erase the word search/sudoku if you used the marker.
Place the lock inside both zipper pull tab loops.
Lock code 7 4 9 – code to be displayed: 0 0 0
The backpack
The last step is to put the water bottle back in the pocket for it and you’re done!
🎒

All packed. You’re a legend.

Hand it off to the next curious friend — or return it so someone else can borrow it.
